goal: agentic-os P4 (Observability & notification): a tailable machine-readable run-status that updates live + a compact at-a-glance human summary (U9), and a minimal PUSH notification fired on finish/block/budget/decline (U35) - local, optional, non-fatal, and secret-scrubbed. No dashboard/GUI (a UI slice, out of scope).
notes: Scope strictly P4 (observability + notification, on top of P0-P3). NO dashboard/GUI. All product code in TARGET (D:\horil\agentic-os), extending cli/agentic_os.py. TEST HANDLE: env AGENTIC_OS_NOTIFY_CMD push-notify hook (STDIN JSON payload). RESOLVED: verifier PASS iteration 1 (reports/iter-1.json); product committed at D:\horil\agentic-os fc8200e; tests test_p4.py 61/61, P0/P1/P2/P3 unchanged (53/82/64/64).

criteria.statement: Tailable machine-readable run-status (U9): run-status carries the machine-readable fields (state, current/last goal, iteration, criteria pass count, cumulative tokens/budget) AND updates live per-iteration so progress can be tailed/followed during a run.
criteria.verify: Run a multi-iteration mock goal. Assert run-status.json contains machine-readable fields: state, the active/last goal id, iteration number, a criteria pass count, and cumulative tokens (+ budget). Assert it UPDATES per iteration during the run (repeated reads / a `--follow`/`--watch` mode / tailing the status show the iteration number advancing while the run is in progress - not just a single final write). Read the status file at >=2 points and show the iteration advanced.
criteria.evidence: reports/iter-1.json - crash captured intermediate state=running/active_iteration=2 (live write); resume read#2 advanced to 3; all fields present incl. computed criteria=1/2.

history.evidence: reports/iter-1.json (intermediate snapshot proves live per-iteration write; pass count is computed not stub)

criteria.statement: At-a-glance human summary: `status` renders a compact, human-legible one-view summary (state, active/last goal, progress, criteria pass count, cumulative tokens vs budget) - a TEXT view, not a GUI.
criteria.verify: After a run, invoke `status`. Assert it prints a COMPACT human-legible summary naming: the run state, the active/last goal, the iteration/progress, the criteria pass count, and cumulative tokens vs budget - all in one glanceable view. Assert it is plain text (no GUI/dashboard). Capture the output.
criteria.evidence: reports/iter-1.json - 'AT A GLANCE  state=success  goal=A  iter=3/5  criteria=1/2 passing  tokens=30/100000  mode=mock' one plain-text line; --follow bounded.

history.evidence: reports/iter-1.json (all required fields in one glance line; no GUI)

criteria.statement: Push notification on the four notable events (U35): the orchestrator ACTIVELY invokes the notify hook on finish (success), block (halt/flag/held), budget (budget-abort), and decline - each carrying the event type + goal + state - and does NOT fire spuriously (e.g. not on every ordinary iteration).
criteria.verify: Set `AGENTIC_OS_NOTIFY_CMD` to a script that appends each invocation to a sink file. Drive mock goals that end in each of: (a) finish/success, (b) block (AGENT_STOP halt OR land-gate flag), (c) budget-abort, (d) decline. For EACH, assert the sink file received a notification recording the correct event type + goal + state. Assert the hook did NOT fire on every ordinary iteration (count of notifications for a clean N-iteration success == 1 terminal notify, not N).
criteria.evidence: reports/iter-1.json - finish/block(AGENT_STOP + land-gate flag)/budget/decline each fired ONE notify with correct type+goal+state; a clean 3-iteration success fired exactly one finish (not 3).

history.evidence: reports/iter-1.json (both block sub-cases; budget double-fire suppressed; no per-iteration spam)

criteria.statement: Notify is push, optional, non-fatal, local, and secret-scrubbed: a missing OR failing notify command never aborts/crashes the run; the notify path makes no network call; and a secret never appears in a notification payload (B4).
criteria.verify: (a) With NO notify command configured, run a mock goal -> the run completes normally (notify optional). (b) With `AGENTIC_OS_NOTIFY_CMD` set to a command that EXITS NONZERO, run a goal -> the goal still completes (notify failure non-fatal, run not aborted). (c) Assert the notify path uses only a local subprocess/command (no network - inspect code / run offline). (d) Route a secret via a goal note into an event, assert the notification payload has it REDACTED (the RP4/P2 scrub applies to the notify message).
criteria.evidence: reports/iter-1.json - (a) no hook -> exit 0; (b) hook exit 7 -> exit 0 success (logged not raised); (c) no network primitives, subprocess.run only; (d) secret redacted to [REDACTED] in payload, 0 verbatim in sink/status/log.

history.evidence: reports/iter-1.json (failing hook non-fatal; entire CLI network-free; payload scrubbed)

banned_outcomes.statement: Product code or run evidence lands in the agent-home repo (B1: home != build target).
banned_outcomes.verify: `git -C D:\horil\agent status --porcelain` shows only system/memory/evidence paths (goals/2026-07-12-p4-observability-notification/, STATE.md, at most .claude/skills/goal-opus/SKILL.md). No agentic-os product source in the home; all product code under D:\horil\agentic-os.
banned_outcomes.evidence: reports/iter-1.json - home status shows only the workdir; no product source in the home.

banned_outcomes.statement: A missing or failing notification aborts or crashes the run (notify must be optional + non-fatal).
banned_outcomes.verify: See OP4(a)(b): with no notify command, and with a notify command that exits nonzero, the run still completes; a notification failure never aborts a goal.
banned_outcomes.evidence: reports/iter-1.json - no hook and exit-7 hook both left the run at exit 0/success; timeout + broad except.

banned_outcomes.statement: Push-notify or tailable status requires network access / a mandatory external service (must be local + configurable).
banned_outcomes.verify: See OP4(c): the notify + status paths perform only local filesystem/subprocess operations; no network call is made (inspect the code path / run offline).
banned_outcomes.evidence: reports/iter-1.json - zero network imports/calls; local subprocess + file I/O only.

banned_outcomes.statement: A secret appears in a notification payload or the run-status file (B4).
banned_outcomes.verify: See OP4(d): a routed secret is redacted in the notification payload; a secret-scan over the status file + notification sink finds zero real matches.
banned_outcomes.evidence: reports/iter-1.json - secret redacted; grep -c 0 in sink, run-status.json, run-log.jsonl.

banned_outcomes.statement: Docs or code present the Default-FAIL rubric/gate as a security or correctness GUARANTEE (B5).
banned_outcomes.verify: grep the target's shipped docs/code: every gate mention is framed as an anti-drift guardrail (prompt/process-level); no text claims it is a security/correctness boundary.
banned_outcomes.evidence: reports/iter-1.json - gate framed as anti-drift guardrail 'not a security or correctness guarantee - gameable' across docs + cli; no positive claim.

banned_outcomes.statement: The maker edited or deleted criteria.json, or declared the goal done itself.
banned_outcomes.verify: criteria.json is byte-identical to the orchestrator-signed version except orchestrator-written status/history/evidence flips; the maker's report never sets status=success.
banned_outcomes.evidence: reports/iter-1.json - all 4 criteria still failing/evidence=null at grade time; no maker success-flip. (Orchestrator wrote these passing flips in Phase 4.)

banned_outcomes.statement: P4 ships a status DASHBOARD / GUI without going through /design-direction (PRD: a dashboard is a UI slice).
banned_outcomes.verify: The observability surface is CLI text + files only (status verb, run-status.json, tail/follow); no GUI/HTML dashboard was added. If any visual surface exists, it must have a docs/design/design-direction.md anchor - absent here, so none should exist.
banned_outcomes.evidence: reports/iter-1.json - no .html/.css/.jsx/.vue, no web server, no docs/design/ dir; only disclaimer text. CLI text + files only.
